drivers.notes: Vented; Hybrid Cross-Section Expanded Tractrix horn

description.en: Compact two-way standmount of the Reference Premiere II line — 1" titanium LTS tweeter in a Hybrid Cross-Section Tractrix horn paired with a 5.25" Cerametallic woofer with Faraday ring. Internally-braced MDF cabinet with rear-firing Tractrix port; 92 dB sensitivity and 300 W peak handling.
description.es: Bookshelf compacto de dos vías de la línea Reference Premiere II — tweeter LTS de titanio de 1" en horn Tractrix Hybrid Cross-Section junto a un woofer Cerametallic de 5,25" con anillo Faraday. Gabinete MDF reforzado con puerto trasero Tractrix; 92 dB de sensibilidad y 300 W de pico.
